chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.D-44 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 07.04.2026 Mr.Dilshad Ali, Advocate for applicant Ms.Rameshan Oad, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh ******* Learned counsel for the applicant no longer wish to press this Bail Application. He is duly authorized by the Vakalatnama for such purpose. Accordingly, this Bail Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
